meaning: adj.罐装的,录音的,一稿数用的,喝醉了的
examples: Sugary canned drinks rot your teeth.
He lived on a diet of water and canned fish.
This is more like it! Real food—not that canned muck.
Supporters were encouraged to bring along canned food and essential supplies to help those trapped.
How many iPhones will be purloined from around unsuspecting necks before this pouch concept gets canned?
